detailed_description: A man in a black tank top and shorts stands in a bathroom, smiling at the camera while lifting his shirt to reveal his abdomen. An augmented reality or animated effect is applied to his stomach, showcasing a glowing, intricate representation of internal organs, specifically the digestive system. The organs pulse and change color, transitioning from vibrant pink and purple tones to a bright green, creating a dynamic visual demonstration of an internal body scan or health visualization.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment serves as the semantic core, demonstrating a visually engaging augmented reality effect of internal organs on a human body. The man's action of lifting his shirt and his positive facial expression contribute to showcasing the 'product' (the visual effect) in a clear, continuous, and impactful manner, including a color transformation of the animation. According to the 'No-Mistake Rule,' as the action starts immediately and continues throughout the clip without dead air or setup, the full duration is preserved.
